RULING:
DEFENDANT APPLIED INDUSTRIAL TECHNOLOGIES, INC., JOINDER TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL-MOGUL ASBESTOS PERSONAL INJURY TRUST AS SUCCESSOR TO FELT PRODUCTS MANUFACTURING COMPANY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING TRANSFER

MOTION To Transfer Venue And Stay Proceedings Pending Transfer
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brian J. Triplett of SINUNU BRUNI, LLP (415-362-9700), appearing for defendant / moving party Federal-Mogul Asbestos Personal Injury Trust as successor to Felt Products Manufacturing Company

RULING:
DEFENDANT FEDERAL-MOGUL ASBESTOS PERSONAL INJURY TRUST'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING TRANSFER

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Federal-Mogul Asbestos Personal Injury Trust's motion to transfer venue to the County of Riverside and stay proceedings pending transfer is granted. Plaintiffs do not oppose defendant's motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
